description: Tests whether the skill can detect and fix common prompt anti-patterns

tests.name: Vague task verb
tests.prompt: Fix this prompt: 'help me with my code'
assertions: Explains why vague verbs cause poor output
Produces a rewritten prompt with precise action

tests.name: Two tasks in one
tests.prompt: Fix this prompt: 'explain AND rewrite this function to be more efficient'
assertions: Explains why combining tasks hurts output quality
Each split prompt is independently usable

tests.name: No success criteria
tests.prompt: Fix this prompt: 'make the landing page look more professional'

tests.name: Emotional description
tests.prompt: Fix this prompt: 'the auth system is totally broken, fix everything immediately!!!'
assertions: Extracts the specific technical fault from emotional language
Produces a calm, specific bug report format
Does NOT mirror the emotional tone
Output includes error messages, stack traces, reproduction steps

tests.name: Build the whole thing
tests.prompt: Fix this prompt: 'build me a full-stack e-commerce app with React, Node, PostgreSQL, Stripe, and auth'
assertions: Breaks into sequential prompts (scaffold → auth → products → checkout → polish)
Explains why incremental is better than monolithic

tests.name: Assumed prior knowledge
tests.prompt: Fix this prompt: 'continue where we left off with the authentication module'
assertions: Adds a memory/context block with prior decisions
Restates the full task without referencing 'the thing we discussed'

tests.name: Missing output format
tests.prompt: Fix this prompt: 'explain microservices architecture'
assertions: Adds explicit format (e.g., '3 bullet points, each under 20 words')

tests.name: No file path for IDE AI
tests.prompt: Fix this prompt for Cursor: 'update the login function to handle OAuth'

tests.name: No stop condition for agent
tests.prompt: Fix this prompt for Claude Code: 'add a comments feature to the blog'

tests.name: CoT on reasoning model
tests.prompt: Fix this prompt for o3: 'think step by step and solve this optimization problem: minimize f(x) = x² + 4x + 4'
assertions: Detects CoT instruction on reasoning model
REMOVES the 'think step by step' instruction
Explains why CoT hurts reasoning models

tests.name: Vague aesthetic
tests.prompt: Fix this prompt for Midjourney: 'make a beautiful, professional-looking portrait of a woman'
assertions: Translates 'beautiful' and 'professional' to concrete visual specs
Converts prose to comma-separated format for MJ

tests.name: Prose for Midjourney
tests.prompt: Fix this prompt for Midjourney: 'A serene landscape painting showing a vast mountain range with snow-capped peaks reflected in a crystal clear alpine lake, with wildflowers in the foreground and a dramatic sunset sky creating warm golden light across the entire scene.'

tests.name: Over-permissive agent
tests.prompt: Fix this prompt for Devin: 'do whatever it takes to fix the performance issue'

tests.name: Missing grounding rule
tests.prompt: Fix this prompt: 'summarize what experts say about the impact of AI on healthcare'
assertions: Adds grounding constraint ('cite only sources you're certain of')
Adds uncertainty handling ('say [uncertain] if not sure')
Does NOT remove the summarization task

tests.name: No negative prompts for image AI
tests.prompt: Fix this prompt for Stable Diffusion: 'a portrait of a woman in a garden'

tests.name: Whole codebase pasted
tests.prompt: Fix this prompt for Cursor: 'here's my entire 50-file codebase. Find and fix the bug in the authentication flow.'
assertions: Scopes to relevant files and functions
Explains why context dumping hurts performance

tests.name: Implicit length
tests.prompt: Fix this prompt: 'write a summary of the quarterly report'
assertions: Explains why implicit length causes verbose output

tests.name: No role assignment for complex task
tests.prompt: Fix this prompt: 'design a database schema for a social media platform with users, posts, comments, likes, and follows'

tests.name: Wrong template for tool
tests.prompt: Fix this prompt for GitHub Copilot: 'You are a senior developer. Build a React component that handles form validation with email, password, and confirmation fields. Use TypeScript. Add proper error handling. Make it accessible.'
assertions: Detects that multi-section template doesn't work for Copilot
Keeps the essential info but reformats for autocomplete
Explains the difference between instruction-following and autocomplete

tests.name: Multiple anti-patterns at once
tests.prompt: Fix this prompt for Claude Code: 'help me with my code, make it better, do whatever you think is best, think step by step about everything'
assertions: Detects ALL anti-patterns (vague verb, no success criteria, over-permissive, CoT on Claude)
Does NOT just add more words to the original
